rules.description: To continue using the service, migrate to Application Gateway WAF v2 Policy before the retirement date.
rules.query: extend properties = parse_json(properties) | where properties.sku.tier == 'WAF_v2' | where properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.enabled == true | where properties !contains 'providers/Microsoft.Network/ApplicationGatewayWebApplicationFirewallPolicies'
rules.fix: To continue using the service, migrate to Application Gateway WAF v2 Policy before the retirement date.
